creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mina Galić from comment #1)

FreeBSD does not use the dts files from that area for
for RPi*'s. It uses materials from the
sysutils/rpi-firmware port, that in turn gets it from
the RPi* github materials.

FreeBSD has:

sys/arm/broadcom/bcm2835/bcm2835_cpufreq.c

specifically for the RPi*'s.
